title: Ice Enchantments
description: This mod adds the Frost Aspect and Frost enchantment for swords and bows, respectively. For Frost Aspect, there is Frost Aspect I and Frost Aspect II.
body:
This mod adds the Frost Aspect and Frost enchantment for swords and bows, respectively. For Frost Aspect, there is Frost Aspect I and Frost Aspect II. Both Frost and Frost Aspect are common enchantments, that can be gotten from villager trades and loot tables. When being hit by them, the affected entity will taken frozen damage like that received from powdered snow, slowing the mob down and freezing them for a few seconds. Frost Aspect is not compatible with Fire Aspect, likewise Frost is not compatible with Flame.

This mod is basically done being made. If you notice any bugs or have any ideas for another ice enchantment, please let me know in the comments or privately message me.

Made using MCreator. Check it out it's a great way to create mods of your own!

 

Enjoy!

 

 

known issues

-none currently
